title: Neutrophilic asthma may not be a distinct endotype.
author_string: Bhalla, Anurag, Sehmi, Roma, Nair, Parameswaran, Mukherjee, Manali
abstract: Sputum neutrophilia must take into account total cell counts to differentiate trivial versus intense neutrophilia. Various aberrant cellular mechanisms may increase susceptibility to airway infections, which consequently lead to high neutrophil counts. https://bit.ly/44ZszWx.
